16	name: oneTBB CI
17	
18	on:
19	  push:
20	    branches: [master]
21	
22	  pull_request:
23	    branches: [master]
24	    types:
25	      - opened
26	      - synchronize
27	      - reopened
28	
29	permissions: read-all
30	
31	env:
32	  BUILD_CONCURRENCY: 2
33	  MACOS_BUILD_CONCURRENCY: 3
34	  TEST_TIMEOUT: 180
35	
36	concurrency:
37	  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref }}
38	  cancel-in-progress: ${{ !contains(github.ref, 'refs/heads/master') }}
39	
40	jobs:
41	  codespell:
42	    runs-on: [ubuntu-22.04]
43	    timeout-minutes: 10
44	    steps:
45	      - name: Harden the runner (Audit all outbound calls)
46	        uses: step-security/harden-runner@fe104658747b27e96e4f7e80cd0a94068e53901d # v2.16.1
47	        with:
48	          egress-policy: audit
49	
50	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
51	      - name: Run scan
52	        run: |
53	          sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y codespell
54	          ${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/.github/scripts/codespell.sh `pwd`
55	
56	  examples_clang-format:
57	    runs-on: [ubuntu-22.04]
58	    timeout-minutes: 10
59	    steps:
60	      - name: Harden the runner (Audit all outbound calls)
61	        uses: step-security/harden-runner@fe104658747b27e96e4f7e80cd0a94068e53901d # v2.16.1
62	        with:
63	          egress-policy: audit
64	
65	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
66	      - name: Run scan
67	        run: |
68	          command -v clang-format
69	          cp -r examples examples_formatted
70	          find examples_formatted -regex '.*\.\(cpp\|hpp\)' -exec clang-format -style=file -i {} \;
71	          diff -r examples examples_formatted
72	
73	  documentation:
74	    needs: [codespell]
75	    env:
76	      BUILD_TYPE: oss
77	    runs-on: [ubuntu-latest]
78	    timeout-minutes: 10
79	    steps:
80	      - name: Harden the runner (Audit all outbound calls)
81	        uses: step-security/harden-runner@fe104658747b27e96e4f7e80cd0a94068e53901d # v2.16.1
82	        with:
83	          egress-policy: audit
84	
85	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
86	      - name: Install prerequisites
87	        run: |
88	          pip3 install -U Jinja2
89	          pip3 install git+https://github.com/executablebooks/sphinx-book-theme.git
90	          pip3 install sphinx_design
91	          echo GITHUB_SHA_SHORT=${GITHUB_SHA::8} >> $GITHUB_ENV
92	          mkdir html
93	      - name: Build documentation
94	        run: |
95	          export BUILD_TYPE=${BUILD_TYPE} && sphinx-build doc html
96	          tar -czvf html.tar.gz html/
97	      - name: Save docs
98	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@bbbca2ddaa5d8feaa63e36b76fdaad77386f024f # v7.0.0
99	        with:
100	          name: oneTBB-html-docs-${{ env.GITHUB_SHA_SHORT }}

114	        with:

119	        with:

121	          path: gh-pages

123	        run: echo GITHUB_SHA_SHORT=${GITHUB_SHA::8} >> $GITHUB_ENV
124	      - name: Download documetation

131	          cd gh-pages
132	          rm -rf *

134	          cp -r ../html/* .
135	          git config user.name github-actions
136	          git config user.email github-actions@github.com
137	          git add .
138	          git commit --reset-author --amend -m "Update from GitHub Actions"
139	          git push --force origin gh-pages
140	
141	  copyright_check:
142	    if: ${{ github.ref != 'refs/heads/master' }}
143	    runs-on: [ubuntu-latest]
144	    steps:
145	      - name: Harden the runner (Audit all outbound calls)
146	        uses: step-security/harden-runner@fe104658747b27e96e4f7e80cd0a94068e53901d # v2.16.1
147	        with:
148	          egress-policy: audit
149	
150	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
151	        with:
152	          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
153	          fetch-depth: 0
154	      - name: Run check
155	        run: |
156	          base_sha=${{ github.event.pull_request.base.sha }}
157	          current_year=$(date +%Y)
158	          apache_copyright_line="Licensed under the Apache License"
159	          uxl_copyright_re="Copyright \(c\) [0-9]+ UXL Foundation Contributors"
160	          intel_copyright_re="Copyright.*[0-9]\{4\}.*Intel"
161	          check_failed=false
162	
163	          new_files=$(git diff --find-renames --diff-filter=A --name-only "$base_sha" || true)
164	          modified_files=$(git diff --find-renames --diff-filter=M --name-only "$base_sha" || true)
165	
166	          if [ -n "$new_files" ]; then
167	            new_with_apache=$(grep -lF "$apache_copyright_line" $new_files || true)
168	            for file in $new_with_apache; do
169	              uxl_match=$(grep -cE "$uxl_copyright_re" "$file" || true)
170	              if [ "$uxl_match" -eq 0 ]; then
171	                echo "ERROR: New file is missing UXL copyright: $file"
172	                check_failed=true
173	              else
174	                year_match=$(grep -cE "Copyright \(c\) ${current_year} UXL Foundation Contributors" "$file" || true)
175	                if [ "$year_match" -eq 0 ]; then
176	                  echo "ERROR: New file must have current year (${current_year}) in UXL copyright: $file"
177	                  check_failed=true
178	                fi
179	              fi
180	            done
181	          fi
182	
183	          if [ -n "$modified_files" ]; then
184	            modified_with_apache=$(grep -lF "$apache_copyright_line" $modified_files || true)
185	            for file in $modified_with_apache; do
186	              uxl_match=$(grep -cE "$uxl_copyright_re" "$file" || true)
187	              if [ "$uxl_match" -eq 0 ]; then
188	                echo "ERROR: Modified file is missing single year UXL copyright: $file"
189	                check_failed=true
190	                continue
191	              fi
192	              original_uxl=$(git show "${base_sha}:${file}" 2>/dev/null | grep -oE "$uxl_copyright_re" || true)
193	              current_uxl=$(grep -oE "$uxl_copyright_re" "$file" || true)
194	              if [ -n "$original_uxl" ] && [ "$original_uxl" != "$current_uxl" ]; then
195	                echo "ERROR: UXL copyright year must not be changed in: $file"
196	                check_failed=true
197	              fi
198	            done
199	          fi
200	
201	          all_changed_files=$(git diff --find-renames --diff-filter=AM --name-only "$base_sha" || true)
202	          if [ -n "$all_changed_files" ]; then
203	            all_with_apache=$(grep -lF "$apache_copyright_line" $all_changed_files || true)
204	            for file in $all_with_apache; do
205	              original_intel=$(git show "${base_sha}:${file}" 2>/dev/null | grep "$intel_copyright_re" || true)
206	              current_intel=$(grep "$intel_copyright_re" "$file" || true)
207	              if [ -n "$original_intel" ] && [ "$original_intel" != "$current_intel" ]; then
208	                echo "ERROR: Intel copyright must not be modified in: $file"
209	                check_failed=true
210	              fi
211	            done
212	          fi
213	
214	          if [ "$check_failed" = true ]; then
215	            exit 1
216	          fi

name: oneTBB CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [master]

  pull_request:
    branches: [master]
    types:
      - opened
      - synchronize
      - reopened

permissions: read-all

env:
  BUILD_CONCURRENCY: 2
  MACOS_BUILD_CONCURRENCY: 3
  TEST_TIMEOUT: 180

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ !contains(github.ref, 'refs/heads/master') }}

jobs:
  codespell:
    runs-on: [ubuntu-22.04]
    timeout-minutes: 10
    steps:
      - name: Harden the runner (Audit all outbound calls)
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@fe104658747b27e96e4f7e80cd0a94068e53901d # v2.16.1
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - name: Run scan
        run: |
          sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y codespell
          ${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/.github/scripts/codespell.sh `pwd`

  examples_clang-format:
    runs-on: [ubuntu-22.04]
    timeout-minutes: 10
    steps:
      - name: Harden the runner (Audit all outbound calls)
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@fe104658747b27e96e4f7e80cd0a94068e53901d # v2.16.1
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - name: Run scan
        run: |
          command -v clang-format
          cp -r examples examples_formatted
          find examples_formatted -regex '.*\.\(cpp\|hpp\)' -exec clang-format -style=file -i {} \;
          diff -r examples examples_formatted

  documentation:
    needs: [codespell]
    env:
      BUILD_TYPE: oss
    runs-on: [ubuntu-latest]
    timeout-minutes: 10
    steps:
      - name: Harden the runner (Audit all outbound calls)
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@fe104658747b27e96e4f7e80cd0a94068e53901d # v2.16.1
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - name: Install prerequisites
        run: |
          pip3 install -U Jinja2
          pip3 install git+https://github.com/executablebooks/sphinx-book-theme.git
          pip3 install sphinx_design
          echo GITHUB_SHA_SHORT=${GITHUB_SHA::8} >> $GITHUB_ENV
          mkdir html
      - name: Build documentation
        run: |
          export BUILD_TYPE=${BUILD_TYPE} && sphinx-build doc html
          tar -czvf html.tar.gz html/
      - name: Save docs
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@bbbca2ddaa5d8feaa63e36b76fdaad77386f024f # v7.0.0
        with:
          name: oneTBB-html-docs-${{ env.GITHUB_SHA_SHORT }}
          path: html.tar.gz

  pages:
    if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' }}
    permissions:
      contents: write
      pages: write
      id-token: write
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [documentation]
    steps:
      - name: Harden the runner (Audit all outbound calls)
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@fe104658747b27e96e4f7e80cd0a94068e53901d # v2.16.1
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout gh-pages
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          ref: gh-pages
          path: gh-pages
      - name: Set env
        run: echo GITHUB_SHA_SHORT=${GITHUB_SHA::8} >> $GITHUB_ENV
      - name: Download documetation
        uses: actions/download-artifact@3e5f45b2cfb9172054b4087a40e8e0b5a5461e7c # v8.0.1
        with:
          name: oneTBB-html-docs-${{ env.GITHUB_SHA_SHORT }}
      - name: Publish to github pages
        run: |
          tar -xvf html.tar.gz
          cd gh-pages
          rm -rf *
          touch .nojekyll # https://github.blog/2009-12-29-bypassing-jekyll-on-github-pages/
          cp -r ../html/* .
          git config user.name github-actions
          git config user.email github-actions@github.com
          git add .
          git commit --reset-author --amend -m "Update from GitHub Actions"
          git push --force origin gh-pages

  copyright_check:
    if: ${{ github.ref != 'refs/heads/master' }}
    runs-on: [ubuntu-latest]
    steps:
      - name: Harden the runner (Audit all outbound calls)
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@fe104658747b27e96e4f7e80cd0a94068e53901d # v2.16.1
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Run check
        run: |
          base_sha=${{ github.event.pull_request.base.sha }}
          current_year=$(date +%Y)
          apache_copyright_line="Licensed under the Apache License"
          uxl_copyright_re="Copyright \(c\) [0-9]+ UXL Foundation Contributors"
          intel_copyright_re="Copyright.*[0-9]\{4\}.*Intel"
          check_failed=false

          new_files=$(git diff --find-renames --diff-filter=A --name-only "$base_sha" || true)
          modified_files=$(git diff --find-renames --diff-filter=M --name-only "$base_sha" || true)

          if [ -n "$new_files" ]; then
            new_with_apache=$(grep -lF "$apache_copyright_line" $new_files || true)
            for file in $new_with_apache; do
              uxl_match=$(grep -cE "$uxl_copyright_re" "$file" || true)
              if [ "$uxl_match" -eq 0 ]; then
                echo "ERROR: New file is missing UXL copyright: $file"
                check_failed=true
              else
                year_match=$(grep -cE "Copyright \(c\) ${current_year} UXL Foundation Contributors" "$file" || true)
                if [ "$year_match" -eq 0 ]; then
                  echo "ERROR: New file must have current year (${current_year}) in UXL copyright: $file"
                  check_failed=true
                fi
              fi
            done
          fi

          if [ -n "$modified_files" ]; then
            modified_with_apache=$(grep -lF "$apache_copyright_line" $modified_files || true)
            for file in $modified_with_apache; do
              uxl_match=$(grep -cE "$uxl_copyright_re" "$file" || true)
              if [ "$uxl_match" -eq 0 ]; then
                echo "ERROR: Modified file is missing single year UXL copyright: $file"
                check_failed=true
                continue
              fi
              original_uxl=$(git show "${base_sha}:${file}" 2>/dev/null | grep -oE "$uxl_copyright_re" || true)
              current_uxl=$(grep -oE "$uxl_copyright_re" "$file" || true)
              if [ -n "$original_uxl" ] && [ "$original_uxl" != "$current_uxl" ]; then
                echo "ERROR: UXL copyright year must not be changed in: $file"
                check_failed=true
              fi
            done
          fi

          all_changed_files=$(git diff --find-renames --diff-filter=AM --name-only "$base_sha" || true)
          if [ -n "$all_changed_files" ]; then
            all_with_apache=$(grep -lF "$apache_copyright_line" $all_changed_files || true)
            for file in $all_with_apache; do
              original_intel=$(git show "${base_sha}:${file}" 2>/dev/null | grep "$intel_copyright_re" || true)
              current_intel=$(grep "$intel_copyright_re" "$file" || true)
              if [ -n "$original_intel" ] && [ "$original_intel" != "$current_intel" ]; then
                echo "ERROR: Intel copyright must not be modified in: $file"
                check_failed=true
              fi
            done
          fi

          if [ "$check_failed" = true ]; then
            exit 1
          fi
